# Chapter 21 Coupon Promotion Audit

Use the Coupon Promotion Audit tasks to review summaries of coupon promotion drops for
the current accounting period, balance batches, and correct variances. The following tasks are
available for completing the Coupon Promotion portion of the audit:


<table>
<tr>
<th>Task</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Import Coupon Information</td>
<td>Imports the system voucher-in and system voucher-out revenue summaries by machine.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Audit Coupon Meters</td>
<td>Audit and correct voucher-in and voucher-out variances between actual and meters.</td>
</tr>
</table>




![Figure 21-1 User Tasks List-Coupon Promotion Audit Tasks](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/255.2.png)




## 21.1 Importing Coupon Promotion Drops

To import a coupon promotion drop:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or User Tasks. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Import Coupon Information. The Retrieving Drop window appears.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="255" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 21 Coupon Promotion Audit" -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/256.1.png)




3\. Click Done when the Coupon Drop is complete. The Retrieving Drop window closes, and
the coupon promotion drop is imported.


## 21.2 Coupon-In Variances

Resolve coupon-in variances are resolved by adjusting coupon-in variances, accepting
variances, or making adjustments.


### 21.2.1 Viewing the Coupon Audit Window

To view the Coupon Audit window:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Audit Coupon Meters. The Coupon Audit window appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/256.2.png)

3\. Select Coupon In.

4\. Select All Dropped or Exceptions to determine which coupons are displayed.


### 21.2.2 Adjusting Coupon-In Meter Variances

To adjust coupon-in variances:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or User Tasks list. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Audit Coupon Meters. The Coupon Audit window appears.

3\. Select a machine, then click Meters. The Coupon In Meter Adjustment for Machine
window appears.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="256" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 21 Coupon Promotion Audit" -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/257.1.png)



4\. Enter the adjusted value in the Value Meter and Count Meter fields, as applicable.

5\. Click OK. The adjustment is saved.


### 21.2.3 Accepting Coupon-In Variances

To accept a coupon-in variance:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or User Tasks list. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Audit Coupon Meters. The Coupon Audit window appears.

3\. Select a machine, then click Accept if the variance is within established guidelines. A
confirmation prompt appears.

4\. Click Yes to accept.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/257.2.png)




i
For multiple variances, use Ctrl + click to select multiple machines, then click
Accept/Unaccept. Click Yes to accept the variances, or No to cancel.


### 21.2.4 Unaccepting Coupon-In Variances

To unaccept a coupon-in variance:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or User Tasks list. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Audit Coupon Meters. The Coupon Audit window appears.

3\. Select a machine, then click Unaccept if the variance is not within established guidelines.
A confirmation window appears.

4\. Click Yes. The variance is no longer accepted.


### 21.2.5 Adjusting Coupons In

To adjust a coupon in:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Audit Coupon Meters. The Coupon Audit window appears.

3\. Select Coupon In. The Coupon Audit window displays coupon-in meters.

4\. Select All Dropped or Exceptions to filter the displayed coupons.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="257" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 21 Coupon Promotion Audit" -->

5\. Select a machine.

6\. Click Actual. The System Coupon In Edit window appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/258.1.png)




7\. Enter the adjusted amount in the Actual Amount field.

8\. Click OK. The adjustment is saved.


### 21.3 Coupon-Out Variances

Resolve coupon-out variances by adjusting or accepting them.


### 21.3.1 Viewing the Coupon Audit Window

To view the Coupon Audit window:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks list. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Audit Coupon Meters. The Coupon Audit window appears.

3\. Select Coupon Out. The Coupon Audit window displays coupon-out meters.

4\. Select All Machines or Exceptions to determine which coupons are displayed.


### 21.3.2 Adjusting Coupon-Out Meter Variances

To adjust coupon-out variances:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks list. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Audit Coupon Meters. The Coupon Audit window appears.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="258" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 21 Coupon Promotion Audit" -->

3\. Select a machine, then click Meters. The Coupon Out Meter Adjustment for Machine
window appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/259.1.png)



4\. Enter the meter value in the Value Meter Adjustment and Count Meter Adjustment fields,
as applicable.

5\. Click OK. The adjustment is saved.


### 21.3.3 Accepting Coupon-Out Variances

To accept coupon-out variances:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks list. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Audit Coupon Meters. The Coupon Audit window appears.

3\. Select a machine.
OR
Hold CTRL and click to select multiple machines.

4\. Click Accept if the variance is within established guidelines. A confirmation prompt
appears.

5\. Click Yes. The variance is accepted.


### 21.3.4 Unaccept Coupon-Out Variances


#### To unaccept coupon-out variances:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or the User Tasks. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Audit Coupon Meters. The Coupon Audit window appears.

3\. Select a machine.
OR
Hold CTRL and click to select multiple machines.

4\. Click Unaccept if the variance is not within established guidelines. A confirmation
prompt appears.

5\. Click Yes. The variance is no longer accepted.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="259" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 21 Coupon Promotion Audit" -->


### 21.3.5 Adjusting Coupons Out

To adjust a coupon out:

1\. Click Coupon Promotion in the Period Timeline or User Tasks. A list of options
appears.

2\. Click Audit Coupon Meters. The Coupon Audit window appears.

3\. Select Coupon Out. The Coupon Audit window displays coupon-out meters.

4\. Select All Dropped or Exceptions to filter the meters shown.

5\. Select a machine, then click Actual. The System Coupon Out Edit window appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/260.1.png)




<table>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">System Coupon Out Edit</td>
<td></td>
<td>☒ X</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Machine Number:</td>
<td>3201</td>
<td colspan="2">Next Machine</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>13.32</td>
<td colspan="2"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td colspan="2"></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6.66</td>
<td colspan="2">OK</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6.66</td>
<td>Cancel</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td colspan="2"></td>
</tr>
</table>


6\. Enter the actual amount in the System Amount field.

7\. Click OK to confirm the adjustment, or click Cancel to cancel the adjustment.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->

<!-- PageBreak -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/261.1.png)
